svg.title: Disjoint Set time complexity explained visually
svg.desc: Four diagrams showing how naive, union-by-rank, path compression, and combined optimizations affect tree structure and operation cost
svg.text: to another — can build a chain
Result: attach smaller rank under larger
First find is O(n) in the worst case (deep
chain). But it flattens the tree so all
subsequent finds are O(1). Spread the cost
over many operations → O(log n) amortized.
Rank keeps the tree balanced (height ≤ log n).
Together they suppress each other's worst cases.
Proven cost per op: O(α(n)) — effectively constant.
